title: Strongthium 4 Pcs 0.5mm 0.8mm 1mm 1.2mm Non Asbestos Gasket Making Material Paper Sheet High Temp for Gasoline Diesel Oil Small Engine DIY Rebuild Sealing 14-9/16" x 11-27/64"
features: With a generous size of 14-9/16" x 11-27/64" per sheet, the material is easy to cut using scissors or tools. Its flexibility allows you to create custom shapes and sizes, making it perfect for DIY projects, machine repairs, or professional use.

Each set includes 4 sheets, 1 pcs of 1/64in (0.5mm), 1 pcs of 1/32in (0.8mm), 1 pcs of 5/128in (1mm), and 1 pcs of 3/64in (1.2mm). This variety ensures you have the right thickness for different sealing needs, from automotive to industrial machinery. Suitable for a wide range of uses, including automotive, chemical, and industrial machinery gaskets, as well as home and garden
projects like vibration reduction, water insulation, soundproofing, and more. It’s also great for small engine repairs and custom gasket creation.

Made from high-quality asbestos-free materials, our gasket sheets are environmentally friendly, safe, and reliable. They offer excellent strength, resilience, and resistance to oil, high temperatures, high pressure, and penetration, making them ideal for tough industrial applications.

You’ll receive 4 large sheets, providing ample material for various projects. The extra-large size and heavy-duty construction make it perfect for customized gasket needs, ensuring you have the right material for any application.
description: Product Description With a generous size of 14-9/16" x 11-27/64" per sheet, these sheets are easy to cut with a knife or scissors, making them ideal for creating custom gaskets or other shapes. Their flexibility and workability make them suitable for both professional and home use.
